results.title: 19 arrested as 'Geng Karim' ring dismantled
results.description: KUALA LUMPUR: The Immigration Department has dismantled a migrant smuggling syndicate known as “Geng Karim” following the arrest of 19 people in Cheras during a raid on July 8.
